tasks.title: Add zbateson/mail-mime-parser

tasks.title: Create EmlBody.php
tasks.description: plainText: ?string, html: ?string. Readonly.

tasks.title: Create EmlAttachment.php
tasks.description: filename, mimeType, content (bytes), isInline, contentId, nestedEml. Readonly.

tasks.title: Create EmlStructure.php
tasks.description: headers, body, attachments + JsonSerializable. Readonly.

tasks.title: Create EmlParseException.php
tasks.description: Carries cause string identifying parse-failure point.

tasks.title: Create EmlParser.php
tasks.description: Constructor injects logger and lazy TextExtractionService.

tasks.title: Implement parse(File): EmlStructure
tasks.description: Extract headers, decode RFC 2047, parse Date.

tasks.title: Body extraction: both plainText and html
tasks.description: Both populated when each part exists.

tasks.title: Attachment extraction
tasks.description: filename, mimeType, content bytes, isInline, contentId.

tasks.title: Recursive nestedEml with depth-3 cap
tasks.description: For message/rfc822 attachments. Beyond depth 3, nestedEml is null.

tasks.title: Implement flatten(EmlStructure): string
tasks.description: Header block + blank line + body + recursive attachment text inline. Markers --- Attachment: ... ---.

tasks.title: HTML→text helper for flat-path body fallback
tasks.description: Drop style/script; convert block elements to newlines; strip tags; decode entities; collapse whitespace.

tasks.title: Encoding fallback to UTF-8
tasks.description: mb_detect_encoding + mb_convert_encoding.

tasks.title: Wrap parse failures
tasks.description: parse() throws EmlParseException; flatten() doesn't throw (works on parsed structure).

tasks.title: Add message/rfc822 cascade branch
tasks.description: After existing PDF/Word/spreadsheet branches.

tasks.title: Implement private extractEml()
tasks.description: Try parse + flatten; on EmlParseException, log + return null.

tasks.title: Add public parseEmlStructured method
tasks.description: Direct delegate to EmlParser::parse(); throws EmlParseException.

tasks.title: Confirm DI wiring
tasks.description: EmlParser resolves with deps; TextExtractionService can call extractEml + parseEmlStructured.

tasks.description: Header extraction, plain-text body, HTML body fallback, multipart, attachments (extractable + non), nested at depths 1-4, depth limit, malformed graceful-fail.
